column1: # Chapter 7: MITRE ATT&CK for ICS Detection Coverage Matrix
# Description: Maps ATT&CK for ICS tactics and techniques to required
#   Use this matrix to identify gaps in detection capability and
#   prioritise telemetry deployment and detection rule development.
# Usage: Complete one row per ATT&CK for ICS technique relevant to
#   your environment. Update quarterly and after every new detection
#   rule deployment. Cross-reference with the threat landscape
#   assessment from Chapter 3 to prioritise based on threat relevance.
#   Covered     — Detection rule deployed and validated
#   Partial     — Detection rule exists but missing data source(s)
#   Gap         — No detection capability; data source may be missing
#   N/A         — Technique not applicable to this environment
#   Critical    — Used by threat actors targeting our sector
#   High        — Used by ICS-targeting threat actors generally
#   Medium      — Documented technique with limited observed use
